comment: 55yo female with limited cutaneous systemic sclerosis (ACR/EULAR 2013 criteria: Raynaud's, sclerodactyly, abnormal nailfold capillaroscopy, anti-Scl70/topoisomerase-I+) + established interstitial lung disease (HRCT-confirmed NSIP pattern), no current lung cancer. SSc-ILD subset carries ~5-7x lung cancer SIR (anti-Scl70 further elevated). Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-SCLERODERMA-LUNG-PREVENTION-SURVEILLANCE (HRCT chest q1-2y + PFTs q6-12mo + smoking-cessation reinforcement); alternative = IND-SCLERODERMA-LUNG-PREVENTION-OBSERVATION (rheumatology-driven, chest imaging only on symptom trigger). Validates v0.3 RF-SCLERODERMA-LUNG-PREVENTION pilot.
